roa.docketEntryComment: DEF REQ ATC TO MODIFY PROBATION, FILED
GJT RELEASED TO CONFLICT ATTY JOHN ZAHAR

/CAL:RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/CTORD:GENERAL ORDER OF RESTITUTION AS TO VICTIMS: SAINT LAURENT, LULULEMONATHLETICA STORE & FOOTPRINT STORE AND THE COURT RETAINS JURISIDICTION OVER RESTITUTION MATTERS/CONTPROB/

/CAL: SENTENCING/X: SENTENCE AS TO COUNT 2/AJW/CH2:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 85D/CTS: 85/X: DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO APD WITHIN 72 HOURS UPON RELEASE FROM ANYCUSTODIAL STATUS (ENROUTE TO SANTA CLARA)/X: AS A CONDITION OF PROBATION,DEFENDANT SHALL BE ON ELECTRONIC MONITORING FOR THE DURATION OF PROBATION TO BE MONITORED BY APD/X: AS TO COUNT 1, DEJ - 1 YEAR OF COMPLIANCE WITH FORMAL PROBATION INCLUDING ELECTRONIC MONITORING/X: HARVEY WAIVER OF TERMS AND CONDITIONS FROM 2487965, 2513553 INTO 19002595/SAORD/SA2: YSL 110 GEARY STREET IN SAN FRANCSICO/WS/WEAP/X: DEFENDANT SHALL NOT POSESS BURGLARY TOOLS/RESTV/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/X: COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO STAY FINES AND FEES AS TO COUNT 2/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/CONTD: RESTITUTION DETERMINATION ON 08-06-19 IN M30/DOPU: COUNSEL/CONTD: STATUS OF DEJ AS TO COUNT 1 ON 05-13-20/DOP/
/CAL: PTC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:   1   2/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 05-10-19/PPRFCUST/REMA/ARBUCKLE/IBARRA/CONTD: SENTENCING/DOP/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/CON:JOHN ZAHAR/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THEDEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/BAIL:75000/NTW/LDTR: 04-22-19//CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE-S23 AND TRIAL-S22/DOP/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY PROBATION/DAWT/MO GRTD/EMTERM/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL'S ORAL MOTION TO TERMINATE PROBATION IS DENIED,/CONTPROB/
/X:PLEA ON COUNT ONE IS WITHDRAWN/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:DEFENDANT IS TO CONTINUE ON PROBATION ON COUNT 2/
/CAL:STATUS OF DEJ AS TO COUNT 1/DAWT/X:NO APPEARANCE BY THE PEOPLE,/CONT/DAWF/
/CAL: PTC/X: COURT CONFIRMS FUTURE HEARING DATE,/
/CAL: PTC/LDTR: 04-22-19/CONTD: BAIL MOTION IN D22 ON 02-28-19/DOP/
